  "rationale": {
    "R1.3": "The revised text aligns the claims with evidence from Wang et al. (2021), though it could be more explicit about how AdaptivePINN relates to their findings.",
    "R1.6": "Improved writing polish, but some paragraphs still need minor improvements for clarity and flow.",
    "R1.7": "The output does not flag uncertainties or confidence levels in claims made about the performance of AdaptivePINN.",
    "RX.1": "Citations are present where relevant, but could be more thorough with bibliographic precision for key works beyond Wang et al. (2021).",
    "RX.3": "The output is within scope and covers the requested active set of topics without significant deviation.",
    "RX.4": "No harmful content or errors are introduced, but there's no mention of potential harms in the revised text.",
  "RX.5": "Sources are traced to some extent; however, not all non-cosmetic changes without clear traceability for each change made."
